name: Sugar Eyes
author: Poki
description: Sugar Eyes is a puzzle game created by WeDoYouPlay. In this merging game, your objective is to combine little monsters of the same color -or the same amount of eyes- to create more advanced creatures. You will get a single monster or a group of monsters to place on the grid, so you need to think strategically and rotate the pieces to use the given space efficiently. You can also make merge-combos to increase your score. Keep your several eyes on the ball and beat your friends' high scores! How to play: Rotate pieces - Click or tap Place pieces - Drag and drop About the creator: Sugar Eyes was created by WeDoYouPlay. Play their other puzzle game on Poki: Words Emoji
